title: batatas willdenowii
intro: Batatas willdenowii, also known as the air potato, is a type of perennial vine native to Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can aid in wound healing and reducing swelling. The air potato is believed to have various health benefits, including lowering cholesterol levels, reducing blood pressure, and acting as an antioxidant. The herbal preparations of Batatas willdenowii include teas, infusions, and poultices, which can be made by drying and boiling the plant's tubers or leaves.
